response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified two distinct musical performances and a transitional scene. 2. Identified Song 1 as a song by Aki Rosenthal, with lyrics transcribed from the screen as no direct match found for the title. 3. Identified Song 2 as 'Sahabat Sejati' by Sheila on 7 via on-screen lyrics and general search. 4. Used search tool to find full lyrics for 'Sahabat Sejati'. 5. Structured the scenes and metadata into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two separate vocal musical performances by VTubers, with a short transitional scene in between. The first performance features Aki Rosenthal, and the second is a collaborative cover of 'Sahabat Sejati' by Hololive ID members.

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal dances in a room, performing a song. On-screen lyrics are displayed.

scenes.description: A transition scene where the character interacts with a desk and microphone. No vocal music is playing.
The performers sing 'Sahabat Sejati'. Characters appear on screen with lyrics.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Sahabat sejatiku,
Hilangkah dari ingatanmu?
Di hari kita saling berbagi,
Dengan kotak sejuta mimpi,
Aku datang menghampirimu,
Kuperlihatkan semua hartaku.
Kita selalu berpendapat,
Kita ini yang terhebat,
Kesombongan di masa muda yang indah.
Aku raja, kau pun raja,
Aku hitam, kau pun hitam,
Arti teman lebih dari sekedar materi.
Pegang pundakku, jangan pernah lepaskan,
Bila ku mulai lelah,
Lelah dan tak bersinar,
Remas sayapku, jangan pernah lepaskan,
Bila ku ingin terbang,
Terbang meninggalkanmu.
Ku selalu membanggakanmu,
Kau pun selalu menyanjungku,
Aku dan kamu darah abadi,
Demi bermain bersama,
Kita duakan segalanya,
Merdeka kita, kita merdeka.
Pegang pundakku, jangan pernah lepaskan,
Bila ku mulai lelah,
Lelah dan tak bersinar,
Remas sayapku, jangan pernah lepaskan,
Bila ku ingin terbang,
Terbang meninggalkanmu.
Tak pernah kita pikirkan ujung perjalanan ini,
Tak usah kita pikirkan ujung perjalanan ini,
Dan tak usah kita pikirkan ujung perjalanan ini.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
My true friend,
Have you forgotten in your memory?
On the day we shared,
With a box of a million dreams,
I came to approach you,
I showed you all my treasures.
We always agree,
That we are the greatest,
The arrogance of a beautiful youth.
I am the king, you are the king,
I am black, you are black,
The meaning of a friend is more than just material.
Hold my shoulder, never let go,
When I begin to tire,
Tired and not shining.
Squeeze my wings, never let go,
When I want to fly,
Fly away leaving you.
I always brag about you,
You always flatter me,
You and I are eternal blood,
For the sake of playing together,
We double everything,
We are independent, we are independent.
Hold my shoulder, never let go,
When I begin to tire,
Tired and not shining.
Squeeze my wings, never let go,
When I want to fly,
Fly away leaving you.
We never thought about the end of this journey,
We don't need to think about the end of this journey,
And we don't need to think about the end of this journey.
